name: courvux-precompiler
description: Build-time expression precompiler for the Courvux reactive UI framework. Compiles template expressions to JS arrow functions so apps can ship without script-src 'unsafe-eval'.
author: Vanjex

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target nodejs --release && rm -f pkg/.gitignore pkg/package.json pkg/README.md pkg/LICENSE
scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --target web --release && rm -f pkg/.gitignore pkg/package.json pkg/README.md pkg/LICENSE
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run build && npm run test:node
